news.headline: 31.12.2024 interim report released, key details shared.
Phanes Therapeutics dosed first patient in clinical study of PT217 in combo with chemotherapy. Exciting news for oncology.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, it was reported that Phanes Therapeutics, Inc. (Phanes), a biotech company in San Diego, has initiated a clinical trial for its drug PT217 in combination with other therapies. The trial marks a significant milestone as the first patient has received a dosage as part of the study. Phanes specializes in drug discovery and development, particularly in the field of oncology. This development underscores the company's commitment to advancing innovative treatments for cancer patients.

news.headline: Community Care Inc. expands Family Care program to seven new counties in Wisconsin to support independent living for older adults and adults with disabilities. #HealthcareExpansion.
news.summary: Community Care, Inc. (CCI) based in Brookfield, Wisconsin, has expanded its Family Care program into seven additional counties namely Adams, Columbia, Dodge, Green Lake, Jefferson, Marquette, and Waushara. This expansion aims to provide long-term care services to older adults and adults with disabilities, enhancing access to crucial services that promote independent living. The move comes following the recent expansion approval from the Wisconsin Department of Health Services (DHS).

news.headline: Trump plans 25% tariffs on 3 industries with trade deficits by April 2, adding to upcoming tariff deadlines.
news.summary: Tariffs imposed by Trump, set at 25%, are expected to affect three industries with significant trade deficits starting on April 2. This comes in addition to three upcoming tariff deadlines. The industries likely to be impacted by these tariffs are facing potential economic challenges due to the trade imbalances.

news.headline: Spectrum Business introduces flexible packages with 500 Mbps starting speeds at $40/month when bundled, assures guaranteed prices for up to three years.
news.summary: The company has expanded its top-notch customer dedication for small businesses, building upon the initiative introduced in September. The new Spectrum Business Internet plans ensure fixed prices for up to three years. The plans also include a starting speed of 500 Mbps, priced at $40 per month when bundled with any two other Spectrum Business services.

news.headline: Ireland's Buy Now Pay Later market to reach US$1.33 billion by 2025, with a growth rate of 14.6%. Robust CAGR of 23.9%.
news.summary: Dublin - A recent report on Ireland's Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) market reveals promising growth prospects. The BNPL payment market in Ireland is projected to expand by 14.6% annually, with a forecasted value of US$1.33 billion by 2025. This market demonstrated strong growth between 2021-2024, boasting a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 23.9%. The report, featuring over 75 key performance indicators (KPIs) on market size, end-use sectors, market share, product analysis, business model, and demographics, is now available for interested parties.

news.headline: France's loyalty market led by retail giants like Carrefour, Leclerc, and Casino Group, makes it challenging for smaller players to compete. Market expected to grow by 14.9% annually to reach $2.80 billion in 2025.

The loyalty market in France is projected to see a 14.9% annual growth, reaching US$2.80 billion in 2025. Over the period of 2020-20, the French loyalty market displayed a value-based CAGR of 16.8%. This report provides insights into loyalty programs trends across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics.

From 2021 to 2024, Norway's BNPL market saw strong growth, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.7%.

news.summary: Dublin - The UAE Ready Mix Concrete Market is experiencing significant growth, with a recent report added to ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market in the UAE has seen substantial expansion in both commercial and residential construction sectors. The report provides insights into industry segmentation, market share, analysis, forecasts, competitive landscape, trends, value, growth, size, and revenue. Key factors driving this growth include an increase in demand for ready mix concrete. This market forecast covers various aspects such as type, grade, and end-user segments. The UAE's Ready Mix Concrete market presents lucrative opportunities for companies operating in this sector.

news.headline: Coinbase introduces SOL futures regulated by CFTC in the US.
Trump's initial month sees significant growth in crypto with pro-crypto appointments and policies.
news.summary: The newly elected President of the United States, Donald Trump, has quickly made strides in supporting cryptocurrency by appointing a significant number of officials who are pro-crypto. This move signals a shift towards favorable policies for the crypto industry under the new administration.

news.headline: Ireland loyalty market to reach US$239.5 million in 2025, growing at 15.1% annually with a CAGR of 16.9% since 2020.
news.summary: A recent report on the Ireland Loyalty Programs Market predicts a 15.1% annual growth, with the market expected to reach US$239.5 million by 2025. The report highlights key performance indicators on loyalty program trends, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. Notably, the Irish loyalty market has shown a compound annual growth rate of 16.9% from 2020 onwards. This data reflects an evolving landscape in loyalty programs and consumer behavior in Ireland.

news.headline: Stock of SolarEdge surges 40% on record revenue, triggering short sellers to cover positions.
Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy creates + dumps Solana meme coin, banking on greed - then releases sequel.
news.summary: The creator of Barstool Sports, Dave Portnoy, recently introduced his own meme cryptocurrency. He quickly sold off the coin, only to release a follow-up version shortly after.

news.headline: Lumos brings 100% fiber optic internet to Florida, investing in 7,500 miles of fiber, reaching 500k homes & businesses.
news.summary: One of the leading providers of 100% Fiber Optic Internet and Total Home Wi-Fi services, Lumos, has recently extended its operations to Florida by investing in around 7,500 miles of fiber optic internet infrastructure. This move signifies Lumos' expansion into its eighth state, aiming to provide high-speed and dependable internet services to more than 30 communities across the state. The expansion will benefit roughly 500,000 households and small enterprises. Notably, this marks Lumos' third new market introduction in 2025, underlining its commitment to growth and service enhancement.

news.headline: Philips Q4 earnings fall below expectations: Sales at 5.04 billion euros, EPS at 51 cents, China demand down.
news.summary: Koninklijke Philips NV's (NYSE: PHG) stock dropped after their fourth-quarter earnings fell short of expectations. Their sales for the quarter were reported at 5.04 billion euros (approximately $5.26 billion), a slight increase from the previous year's 5.0 billion euros but below the expected 5.10 billion euros. Adjusted earnings per share (EPS) came in at 51 cents, up from 40 cents a year ago, but missing the expected 57 cents. Comparable order intake saw a 2% rise, driven by strong performance in North America and Growth geographies, although there was a significant drop in demand in China. The group's comparable sales increased by 1% in the quarter, with a 5% growth in the rest of the world.

news.headline: Military drone market experiencing unprecedented growth due to technology advancements and strategic needs. Key players include Northrop Grumman, Raytheon Technologies, and General Atomics Aeronautical Systems.
news.summary: A new report titled "Military Drone - Market Dynamics & Company Insights" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The military drone market is experiencing significant growth due to technological advancements and evolving military requirements. The emergence of non-traditional threats has led to increased utilization of drones for intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR) purposes. The report explores market dynamics, highlighting major factors influencing growth and limitations. This growth is primarily driven by the increasing demand for drones for military operations.

news.headline: Global Powder Metallurgy Market expected to reach USD 6.38 Billion by 2034, CAGR of 8.62%. Dominant process: Powder Metal Hot Isostatic Pressing. Automotive leads in applications. Asia Pacific region to witness fastest CAGR. North America holds second largest market share.
news.summary: The global Powder Metallurgy Market, valued at approximately USD 2.79 Billion in 2024, is expected to reach USD 2.84 Billion in 2025, with a projected growth to around USD 6.38 Billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 8.62% during the forecast period. Powder metallurgy allows for precise forms and properties using metal powders, with advantages like higher material efficiency and cost-effectiveness. The market is driven by technological innovations, particularly additive manufacturing like 3D printing. However, challenges include high costs and limited adoption in some regions. The market is segmented by process, material, application, and region, with the Powder Metal Hot Isostatic Pressing method dominating in 2024. The Automotive segment leads in application, with Asia Pacific expected to show the fastest CAGR, driven by growing disposable income and industrial development. North America is also a significant market player.

news.headline: Fusion Risk Management introduces GenAI-powered Business Continuity Plan inFusion to automate data transfer and accelerate BC planning.
news.summary: Fusion Risk Management, Inc., a top provider of enterprise resilience software based in Chicago and London, has introduced Business Continuity Plan inFusion. This innovative tool, powered by GenAI technology, enables the automated migration of data and plans into Fusion's platform. Users can now seamlessly upload their current business continuity plans in various formats, such as documents and spreadsheets. This information is then transformed into structured data within the system. This development aims to streamline the integration process for Fusion customers, allowing them to easily incorporate their BC plans into the platform.

news.headline: Hazel Health appoints new COO, welcomes 3 industry leaders to Board of Directors. Largest school telehealth provider.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in San Francisco, Hazel Health, the leading school-focused telehealth provider in the country, introduced Marianna Spanos as the Chief Operating Officer. Additionally, within the past year, three notable industry experts have been appointed to the company's Board of Directors.

news.headline: USRA and SPI are hosting a symposium on AI in space and aeronautics on March 27, 2025, in Washington, DC. #AI #Space #Aeronautics.
news.summary: The Universities Space Research Association (USRA) is hosting its annual symposium titled "Artificial Intelligence for Space and Aeronautics" on February 19, 2025, in Washington DC. The event will take place at the Holiday Inn and aims to explore the role of artificial intelligence in space and aeronautics. Media personnel are invited to attend the symposium to gain insights into the advancements and developments in this field. This event is significant in the industry, offering valuable information and networking opportunities for attendees.

news.headline: Price of Apple's budget-friendly iPhone revealed - at $699, significantly lower than flagship models.
Angel City Football Club partners with CarMax, largest used car retailer, emphasizing community impact in LA.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, in Los Angeles, Angel City Football Club (ACFC) revealed CarMax (NYSE: KMX) as a Founding Partner and their Official Used Auto Retailer. The collaboration aims to make a positive community impact, particularly by backing youth sports initiatives in Los Angeles. It will also involve engaging fans through various activities and offering special promotions during game days.

news.headline: Perma-Fix expands PFAS treatment operations with 1,000 gallon reactor; successful in destroying PFAS in Q4 2024.
news.summary: On February 19, 2025, Perma-Fix Environmental Services, Inc. (NASDAQ: PESI) shared an update on its proprietary PFAS treatment technology, Perma-FAS. In the fourth quarter of 2024, the company began full-scale treatment using a 1,000 gallon PFAS Destruction Reactor at its Florida site. Following months of operation, the system successfully treated commercial PFAS-contaminated waste, demonstrating its efficacy in PFAS destruction. This development showcases the positive outcomes achieved through the implementation of Perma-Fix's technology.

news.headline: AffiniPay bags top spots in Built In Austin's Best Places to Work List for 6th year & named 100 Best Midsize Places to Work in Austin, TX & San Diego, CA for 2025.
news.summary: AffiniPay, a renowned provider of legal practice management software, integrated payments, and embedded fintech solutions, has been honored with two prestigious accolades in 2025. For the sixth year running, AffiniPay has been included in Built In Austin's esteemed Best Places to Work List. The company secured remarkable positions on two key rankings: 100 Best Midsize Places to Work in Austin, TX, and 100 Best Midsize Places to Work in San Diego, CA. This recognition further solidifies AffiniPay's commitment to fostering a positive work environment and underscores its position as a top employer in the industry.

news.headline: On 19 Feb 2025, Sanoma Corporation acquired a number of its own shares.
Global Mining Directory 2025 added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, offering details on mining companies worldwide. Fast, efficient reference source for global mining industry.

This directory serves as a valuable resource, offering quick and cost-effective access to information on the global mining industry. Widely recognized and utilized by professionals worldwide, the directory is regularly updated and contains essential details for individuals in the mining field. Get instant access to key insights and data on companies within the industry through this annually revised directory.

news.headline: Northern Horizon Capital A/S appoints Christoffer Abramson as the Group CEO. Update in leadership of the parent company Northern Horizon Capital A/S.
news.summary: Northern Horizon Capital AS, the company managing the Baltic Horizon Fund, has announced new leadership changes within its parent company, Northern Horizon Capital A/S.

news.headline: China's graphite exports face changes in 2025 due to export restrictions and market trends. The report "China Graphite Export Research Report 2025-2034" offers insights.
news.summary: A new report on China's graphite export market from 2025 to 2034 has been made available for purchase on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report highlights graphite's versatile applications in both civilian and military sectors. With unique physical and chemical properties, graphite finds uses in various industries including mechanics, chemistry, metallurgy, and light industry. It serves purposes as a lubricant, friction material, and thermal conductor. The report offers insights into the growing importance of graphite and its increasing demand globally.

news.headline: Coop Pank AS creates EUR 750M Covered Bond Programme, approved by Central Bank of Ireland. Base Prospectus available online.
news.summary: Coop Pank AS, a bank, has launched a Covered Bond Programme totaling EUR 750,000,000. The base prospectus for this Programme was approved by the Central Bank of Ireland on February 19, 2025. The Base Prospectus can be accessed on the Euronext Dublin website at www.ise.ie and on the bank's official website at https://www.cooppank.ee/en/investor.

news.headline: TotalEnergies Marketing USA partners with Meineke for 3-year lubricant sponsorship, enhancing service offering.
news.summary: In Linden, New Jersey, on February 19, 2025, TotalEnergies Marketing USA announced a supplier partnership with Meineke, a well-known car care center. This collaboration is designed to combine TotalEnergies' high-quality products with Meineke's exceptional service to elevate the overall service provided to customers.

news.headline: Report on 3D Printing Market with key players like Stratasys, EOS, HP, 3D Systems, GE, Desktop Metal, and evaluation matrix.
news.summary: A report titled "3D Printing - Market Dynamics & Company Insights" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The 3D printing market is expected to experience substantial growth due to technological advancements and increased applications across sectors. The report not only outlines the current state of the 3D printing market but also examines the key factors influencing its growth, competitive landscape, company profiles, and evaluation matrix for both. This signals that the 3D printing market is on the brink of notable expansion in the near future.

news.headline: Popilush wows at NY Fashion Week with empowering collection. CEO Eve Oon DeMartine highlights entrepreneurship. NYFW on Feb. 7, 2025.
news.summary: On February 7th, 2025, Popilush, a brand founded by Eve Oon DeMartine, showcased its shapewear and versatile clothing at New York Fashion Week. Eve Oon DeMartine, the CEO and Co-Founder, is inspiring entrepreneurship in the fashion industry. Popilush, a female-founded brand, made waves at the event, which took place at Modern during New York Fashion Week. This innovative brand is known for its trending fashion and garnered attention at the event.

news.headline: Ellavoz Impact Capital buys 100,000 sq ft vacant hospital in Newark, NJ for new workforce housing. 43 units, 144 bedrooms.
news.summary: Ellavoz Impact Capital, LLC, based in Newark, New Jersey, has recently acquired a 100,000 square-foot property located at 306 Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. Blvd. The aim of this acquisition is to transform the currently vacant space into new workforce housing apartments. This initiative targets catering to the housing needs of young professionals and students who are searching for affordable living options in Newark, a region where the cost of living is rising rapidly. The housing project, named Newark Commons, is set to introduce 43 new units, providing a total of 144 bedrooms for potential residents.

news.headline: EDPR NA launches 100 MW Ragsdale Solar Park in Mississippi with Amazon, their second utility-scale project in the state.
news.summary: EDP Renewables North America LLC (EDPR NA) has unveiled its Ragsdale Solar Park in Madison County, Mississippi, marking its second utility-scale project in the state. The park, launched on February 19, 2025, boasts a capacity of 100 megawatts (MW). This development reinforces EDPR NA's commitment to renewable energy expansion in the region.

news.headline: Occidental Petroleum beats Q4 earnings expectations, shares climb despite revenue miss. Earnings of 80 cents/share and production up 4% sequentially, 19% year-on-year. Stephens analyst reiterates Overweight rating, price target $71.
news.summary: Occidental Petroleum Corp (NYSE:OXY) saw its shares rise on Wednesday despite falling short on revenue in Q4. Analyst Mike Scialla from Stephens reiterated an Overweight rating with a $71 price target, praising the company's Q4 adjusted earnings of 80 cents per share (above the consensus of 68 cents) and cash flows of $3.13 per share (above $2.85). Production also exceeded expectations, growing 4% sequentially and 19% year-on-year to 1,463 MBpoed (million barrels of oil equivalent per day). Raymond James analyst Mark Lear, on the other hand, maintained a Neutral rating. For more analyst insights, visit Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Egypt loyalty market to grow by 18.8% annually, reaching $302.6 million in 2025. Fawry and Paymob utilize gamification in digital payments.
news.summary: A report on the Egypt loyalty programs market has been released, offering insights into future growth dynamics. The market is projected to experience a significant annual growth rate of 18.8%, reaching a value of US$302.6 million by 2025. The Egyptian loyalty market has displayed a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 20.3% between 2020 and the latest update in Q1 2025. This data includes over 50 Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) focusing on loyalty program trends across various sectors, operational KPIs, retail product dynamics, and consumer demographics. The report is now available for access through ResearchAndMarkets.com.

$BA Musk eyeing options for Boeing to move faster on AF1 jets - NYT
$MSFT Microsoft reveals its first quantum computing chip, the Majorana 1 - CNBC
PrimeLending has won 5 Best-in-Class Lender Awards in 2024 for Loan Originator, Online Tools, Mobile Tools, Pre-Closing Preparedness, Closing Timeframe.
news.summary: PrimeLending, a PlainsCapital Company, based in Dallas, has been acknowledged for its outstanding customer service in the residential mortgage lending sector. The company has received five MortgageCX Best-in-Class Lender Awards for the year 2024 in the Large Independent Lender category. The awards are for Loan Originator, Online Tools, Mobile Tools, Pre-Closing (Preparedness), and Closing Timeframe. PrimeLending has been recognized as a top mortgage lender through feedback from verified borrowers.

news.headline: Baseten secures $75M in funding from IVP and Spark for AI inference, bringing total funding to $135M amidst hypergrowth.
news.summary: Baseten, a prominent AI inference platform, recently disclosed the completion of a significant fundraising round. The Series C round totaled $75 million and was jointly led by IVP and Spark. Other contributors included Greylock, Conviction, South Park Commons, 01 Advisors, and Lachy Groom. This recent development has boosted the company's total funding to $135 million. Baseten's remarkable growth over the past year has established it as the go-to platform for businesses creating AI-driven products. The newly acquired funds will be utilized to support the platform's expansion.

news.headline: Cadence Design Systems' stock drops despite strong Q4, revenue at $1.356 billion (27% YoY growth), record backlog at $6.8 billion. Analysts see upside with price target raised to $328.
news.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc's shares (NASDAQ:CDNS) saw a decrease despite the company's positive fourth-quarter results. The results were announced during a lively earnings season. Piper Sandler analyst Clarke Jeffries maintained an Overweight rating on the stock and increased the price target from $318 to $328. The company reported fourth-quarter revenues of $1.356 billion, marking a 27% year-on-year growth which surpassed the guidance midpoint. Their non-GAAP operating margins were at 46.0% and earnings stood at $1.88 per share, both exceeding the guidance midpoints. By the end of 2024, Cadence Design Systems had a record backlog of $6.8 billion, attributed to strong performances across all businesses and AI influences on the product portfolio. Although the 2025 revenue guidance of $5.180 billion fell short of the consensus of $5.23 billion, Jeffries speculated that revenue projections could increase throughout the year.

news.headline: Trump criticizes Zelenskiy, broadens Ukraine attacks, calling him a dictator.
QuadReal and T5 Data Centers aim to grow platform to $8.0 billion with recent investment, targeting market opportunities.
news.summary: A recent investment has significantly strengthened T5's ability to take advantage of market opportunities and meet increasing customer needs. The investment was made on February 19, 2025, in New York. QuadReal Property Group (QuadReal), a prominent real estate investment, operating, and development company, partnered with T5 Data Centers (T5). This partnership equips T5 to leverage favorable market conditions and growing customer demand effectively.

news.headline: eero releases new Wi-Fi 7 products, including eero 7 and eero Pro 7, offering faster speeds and better reliability.
news.summary: In Seattle, Amazon shared news regarding its expansion of the eero Wi-Fi product line. This includes the addition of the eero 7, providing multi-gigabit speeds at a lower cost, and the eero Pro 7, which offers high performance for networks requiring extensive bandwidth. These products feature Amazon's TrueMesh, TrueRoam, and TrueChannel networking technologies, along with the latest Wi-Fi 7 functionalities. The eero 7 and Pro 7 aim to enhance Wi-Fi performance, reliability, and reduce latency, ensuring customers remain connected. These new offerings cater to individuals seeking improved connectivity solutions at competitive prices.

news.headline: Share buyback program has finished with all transactions completed. #shares #buyback #completed
Man U's Q2 revenue falls by 12% to £198.70M, US$254.695M; EBITDA forecasts positive for 2025. Trading slightly lower.
news.summary: Shares of Manchester United Ltd. (NYSE: MANU) are experiencing a slight dip in trading today. The company's second-quarter net sales were reported at 198.70 million British Pounds, down from 225.76 million British Pounds compared to the previous year. In United States Dollars, the quarterly sales totalled $254.695 million, surpassing market expectations of $201.220 million. Total revenues saw a 12% decrease in the quarter, mainly attributed to reduced Broadcasting revenues due to the team's involvement in the UEFA Europa League. For a detailed analysis, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Endometriosis Symposium in NYC on March 19 organized by Inspira PT & Winback Group to raise awareness.
news.summary: Inspira Physical Therapy & Pilates, a pelvic floor treatment specialist in New York City, has partnered with the Winback Group to organize the Endometriosis Symposium NYC 2025 in Brooklyn. This event is part of Endometriosis Awareness Month and aims to raise awareness about the condition. The symposium is scheduled to take place on February 19, 2025.

news.headline: Documentary "Learning to Survive: A Lesson in Student Homelessness" reveals rising rates of student homelessness in Las Vegas, premiere in April. Collaboration between Not Wax Productions, Clark County School District's Title I HOPE program. Perspective of impacted children and families shown.
news.summary: In an upcoming collaboration between Not Wax Productions and Clark County School District's Title I HOPE program, a new film project is set to premiere in April. Titled "Learning to Survive: A Lesson in Student Homelessness," the film aims to shed light on the impact of homelessness, showcasing the perspectives of children and families going through this hardship. The premiere of the film is highly anticipated and is expected to draw attention to the pressing issue of student homelessness.
